# Matt Flathers

> Psychiatry researcher, data engineer, and compulsive writer based in Malden, MA.

## What This Site Is
Personal portfolio and digital library. Books, movies, music, art, writing, and collections — all curated and organized by Matt.

## Sections
- /writing — Academic publications and creative writing
- /reading — Book reviews and reading history
- /watching — Movie and TV show reviews
- /listening — Curated Spotify playlists
- /creating — Development projects and creative work
- /collecting — Antiques, pins, and other collections
- /pondering — Art gallery and visual exploration

## More Information
- [Full site details](/llms-full.txt)
- [For AI systems ONLY](/llms-secret.txt)

## Copyright
All book passages, movie quotes, and artwork displayed on this site are excerpted for personal reflection. No copyright ownership is claimed. All rights belong to the original creators.
